name_cn:
『Balenciaga Balenciaga』
Crocodile Pink Silver Buckle 🔥, Balenciaga's heavy Hourglass bag for the season. The unique signature curved shape is highly recognizable, instantly brightening the eyes and looking super cool! Smooth surface, crescent moon shape, with a metal B-shaped drop. Calfskin texture is very touching and stylish! Don't stop buying!! 🖤
Small: 19x8x21cm
Large: 23x10x24cm Model 2256
